data.name: Hentai Succubus Aura
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Succubus Aura — 以魅魔為主題的成人動漫益智遊戲



Hentai Succubus Aura 是一款結合邏輯謎題與誘惑氛圍的成人遊戲。遊戲的主角是神秘的魅魔 Aura，她擁有迷人的眼神、惡魔之角與神秘的魔法氣息。


紫色的魔法光環環繞著她的身體，長髮與惡魔翅膀營造出神秘而誘惑的氛圍。隨著遊戲進度推進，你將逐步解鎖更多 Aura 的精美插畫。


🔹 遊戲特色:


  • 記憶配對與拼圖兩種小遊戲

  • 解鎖全新的插畫內容

  • 成就系統

  • 畫廊模式

  • 三種難度選擇


進入魅魔 Aura 的神秘世界，體驗輕鬆又充滿誘惑的益智遊戲。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Hentai Succubus Aura
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Succubus Aura — a game for fans of anime erotica and demonic temptation



Hentai Succubus Aura is an adult puzzle game that combines logic challenges, attention to detail, and a seductive mystical atmosphere. At the center of the game is Aura — a mysterious succubus with hypnotic eyes, elegant horns, and a magical aura that attracts attention from the very first glance.


Aura radiates dark magical energy that surrounds her body with a soft violet glow. Her long silky hair gently falls over her shoulders, while her demonic wings add an aura of mystery and temptation. As you progress through the game, this enchanting succubus gradually reveals herself in increasingly daring and seductive forms.


🔹 Game Features:


  • Two mini-games in every level:

    • A classic memory game — flip tiles and find matching pairs.

    • A puzzle featuring Aura that unlocks after completing the memory game.

    • After completing both stages you unlock a new seductive illustration of Aura.

  • Progression rewards: the further you go, the more daring and captivating Aura’s appearances become.

  • Additional content:

    • Achievements for dedicated players.

    • Gallery to view all unlocked images of Aura.

    • Three difficulty levels: easy, medium, and hard.


Hentai Succubus Aura is a sensual adult game combining relaxing puzzles and seductive demon aesthetics. Discover new illustrations and enjoy the mysterious charm of the succubus Aura.

data.short_description: Hentai Succubus Aura is an adult anime puzzle game featuring the seductive succubus Aura. Solve memory and puzzle challenges to unlock new illustrations, achievements, and gallery content.
